author: Haroen Viaene
subject: fix(dependencies): remove qs limitation (#6850)
body:
* fix(dependencies): remove qs limitation

Previously, we limited qs to versions < 6.10, because since that version the size of the package significantly increased.

However, a vulnerability (https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-6rw7-vpxm-498p) relevant for server use cases causes us to need to bump the version past 6.14.1 allowed now.

Fixes #6849

* patch parcel: https://github.com/parcel-bundler/parcel/pull/10053
